creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Several ports are broken as fallout from removing libgnuregex (=-(). Here's a list from a cursory grep:

- comms/acfac
- x11-toolkits/vdk
- www/spreadlogd
- textproc/mgdiff
- textproc/chpp
- lang/scm
- devel/cvs
- misc/colortail (still builds, but without regex support)
- news/pan
- editors/xcoral
- editors/ne
- editors/zile

Patches forthcoming.
